cmd:
if [ -z "$N8N_API_KEY" ]; then echo NO_KEY; exit 0; fi
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,urllib.request,os,re
key=os.environ["N8N_API_KEY"]; base="https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1"
for wid in ["GIhQk0ETziCTYgTB","GGnGKrjyuCU3nrcC"]:
    d=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(base+"/workflows/"+wid,headers={"X-N8N-API-KEY":key}),timeout=20))
    print("###",d.get("name"))
    for n in d.get("nodes",[]):
        p=n.get("parameters",{})
        code=p.get("jsCode","") or ""
        jb=p.get("jsonBody","") or ""
        blob=code+"\n"+jb
        for ln in blob.splitlines():
            if re.search(r"claude-|model|anthropic-beta|max_tokens", ln):
                print("  ",ln.strip()[:140])
        # header params
        for hp in (p.get("headerParameters",{}) or {}).get("parameters",[]) if isinstance(p.get("headerParameters"),dict) else []:
            print("  HDR",hp.get("name"),"=",str(hp.get("value"))[:40])
PY
